description: A-share sector ETF flow interpretation model. This model reads observations and flexible risk factors, writes review outputs, and does not modify graph scores.

labels.description: Strong relative capital-flow bias. Requires review before any portfolio decision.
Constructive flow bias with some confirmation.
Outflow or pressure watch. Needs confirmation from flow and market data.
Strong pressure in the current signal set.

rules: The engine ranks sector flow pressure; it is not a trading command.
If ETF share history is missing, direct_flow can only use proxy observations and confidence must stay limited by available inputs.
External factor effects can reduce or improve sector score, but cannot override domestic market confirmation by themselves.
A new sector can join the model through config/sector_catalog without changing core engine code.
